attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_FND_USER.USER_ID, CG1_FND_USER.USER_NAME, CG1_FND_USER.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_FND_USER.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_FND_USER.CREATION_DATE, CG1_FND_USER.CREATED_BY, CG1_FND_USER.ENCRYPTED_FOUNDATION_PASSWORD, CG1_FND_USER.ENCRYPTED_USER_PASSWORD, CG1_FND_USER.SESSION_NUMBER, CG1_FND_USER.START_DATE, CG1_FND_USER.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_FND_USER.END_DATE, CG1_FND_USER.DESCRIPTION, CG1_FND_USER.LAST_LOGON_DATE, CG1_FND_USER.PASSWORD_DATE, CG1_FND_USER.PASSWORD_ACCESSES_LEFT, CG1_FND_USER.PASSWORD_LIFESPAN_ACCESSES, CG1_FND_USER.PASSWORD_LIFESPAN_DAYS, CG1_FND_USER.EMPLOYEE_ID, CG1_FND_USER.EMAIL_ADDRESS, CG1_FND_USER.FAX, CG1_FND_USER.CUSTOMER_ID, CG1_FND_USER.SUPPLIER_ID, CG1_FND_USER.WEB_PASSWORD, CG1_FND_USER.GCN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, CG1_FND_USER.PERSON_PARTY_ID, CG1_FND_USER.GES_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_FND_USER.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 CG1_FND_USER 
WHERE
 CG1_FND_USER.GES_UPDATE_DATE > '$$LastExtractDate'
